description: Acknowledged failures for regression tests. Entries here are skipped by regression assertions. Every entry requires a reason and acknowledgement date.

entries.reason: Exposed by cardinal_direction fix — solver now correctly sees that Old Earth Artillery's aoe_behind destroys a friendly building at A6 when firing E6->B6. Picks this plan anyway because alternatives score lower (24/24 perms explored). Evaluator may need to raise building_lost penalty, or this is legitimately the least-bad plan given the board. Not a sim correctness bug; a value-tuning discussion.

Pinnacle Ice Forest t3 — RockartMech fires Rock Launcher at D6 with splash/push collateral against a 1HP building. Plan chosen is identical before and after the next_turn_threat_penalty addition (2026-04-22); penalty scales all alternatives equally so selection is unchanged. Crowded 6-enemy board with 1HP buildings everywhere; legitimately least-bad plan. Value-tuning territory, not a sim bug.

Historical Rift Walkers grid-1 board surfaced again during simulator v61 regression: current solver chooses Artemis Artillery E6->B6, damaging one building HP while leaving the already-destroyed TankMech state unchanged. This is a dirty least-bad/value-tuning case on an old failure board, not the Mission_Teleporter self-AoE targeting fix.

Historical Random Balanced board surfaced again during simulator v61 regression: current solver chooses Cluster Artillery plus Vice Fist collateral that reaches grid 0. The board is already a known dirty/value-tuning scenario around Ranged_Defensestrike and Prime_Shift collateral, unrelated to the Mission_Teleporter post-swap targeting change.

Simulator v97 surfaces Fenrir/Kai Opener Boost on the R.S.T. Corporate HQ turn 1 corpus board. Raw solve now prefers a boosted Taurus/Artemis collateral line that damages one building HP; auto_turn safety would still block this dirty plan before live execution. This is a value-tuning/safety-wrapper case, not a Boosted status simulator correctness failure.

Hard Rusting Hulks Mission_Holes turn 1 corpus board recorded this Pulse Repulse building-HP collateral under simulator v115 before the smoke-landing fix. Current top-k audit finds no safety-clean candidate in the first 1000 plans; the first non-self-damage plan is still dirty grid loss, and live auto_turn would keep it behind safety/dirty consent. Value-tuning/safety-wrapper case, not a landing-on-smoke simulator regression.

Hard Rusting Hulks Mission_ScarabBoss turn 3 corpus board recorded this Pulse Repulse building-HP collateral under simulator v115 before the smoke-landing fix. Current top-k audit finds no safety-clean candidate in the first 1000 plans; the first non-self-damage plan is still non-overridable objective loss, and live auto_turn would block/consent-gate the dirty line. Value-tuning/safety-wrapper case, not a landing-on-smoke simulator regression.

Arachnophiles Efficient Explosives corpus board surfaced during the v320 Arachnoid Bite regression run. The 2s replay times out after all 24 permutations and chooses BulkMech C3 Ricochet Rocket at E3/E4 with one building-HP collateral; live auto_turn safety would keep this behind dirty-plan consent. Value-tuning/safety-wrapper case, unrelated to the spawned Arachnoid corpse-bump simulator fix.

Arachnophiles Efficient Explosives corpus board surfaced during the v320 Arachnoid Bite regression run. The 2s replay times out after all 120 permutations and chooses a dirty Ricochet/Area Shift line with one building-HP collateral; live auto_turn safety would block this before execution. Value-tuning/safety-wrapper case, unrelated to the spawned Arachnoid corpse-bump simulator fix.

Arachnophiles Mission_BouncerBoss turn 2: Arachnoid Bite spends one HP on the already doubly-targeted E5 building to kill BouncerBoss. No-self-damage alternatives leave the boss alive, forfeit the destroy-boss objective, and preserve no additional final grid or building HP. Predicted and live final infrastructure agree, so this is trigger/value semantics rather than a simulator regression and is unrelated to v340 Totem projectile tracing.

Heat Sinkers Mission_ScorpionBoss turn 2: the Maximum Firepower achievement bonus saturates the 1,000-candidate frontier with infrastructure-loss lines, including Inferno's knowingly dirty Thermal Discharger shot. Every exposed candidate loses grid or building HP; live safety marks and dirty-blocks the selected line. This is achievement value-tuning/frontier coverage, not a simulator semantic regression, and the board contains no Totem affected by v340.
